revision.comment: Protected "[[Template:Japan-noble-stub]]": [[WP:SEMIPROT|semi-protection]] of high-usage templates to combat systematic vandalism ([Edit=Require autoconfirmed or confirmed access] (indefinite) [Move=Require autoconfirmed or confirmed access] (indefinite))
revision.text: {{asbox | image = Sasa_Rindo.svg | pix = 30 | subject = | article = biography | qualifier = of a ''[[kuge|Japanese noble]]'' | category = Japanese nobility stubs | tempsort = | name = Template:Japan-noble-stub }}<noinclude>[[Category:Japan stub templates|Noble]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: mass importing wikipedia templates

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
